solana.description: Solana CLI and platform tools via the official quick installer. Use the granular entries below to diagnose or fix partial installs.
solana.verify: rustc --version && solana --version && anchor --version && surfpool --version && node --version && yarn --version

anchor.description: Anchor CLI via AVM (Anchor Version Manager). Requires Rust/cargo. Add ~/.avm/bin and ~/.cargo/bin to PATH if anchor is not found after install.
anchor.download: cargo install --git https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor avm --force && avm install latest && avm use latest

surfpool.description: Local validator with mainnet state fork support; drop-in for solana-test-validator. Install separately if the Solana quick installer did not include it.

rust.description: Rust toolchain (rustc/cargo) for Solana programs, Anchor, and AVM. Required before anchor or native program builds.

node.description: Node.js for TS clients, Anchor integration tests, and SDK scripts. Installed here via fnm (Fast Node Manager). Restart the shell or source your profile after install.
node.download: curl -fsSL https://fnm.vercel.app/install | bash && fnm install --lts && fnm default lts-latest

yarn.description: Yarn package manager, common in Anchor and legacy Solana JS repos. Uses Node corepack when available.

jq.description: JSON processor for RPC responses and CLI debugging. Uses Homebrew on macOS or apt on Debian/Ubuntu.
jq.download: command -v brew >/dev/null && brew install jq || (sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y jq)
